---
name: 🚀 Suggest a Tool
about: Suggest a new tool to add to the database
title: '[Tool Suggestion] '
labels: ['tool-suggestion', 'needs-review']
assignees: ''

---

## Tool Information

**Tool Name:**
<!-- e.g., Postman -->

**Official URL:**
<!-- e.g., https://postman.com -->

**Category:**
<!-- Choose one: AI & LLM Tools / Code Snippets & Boilerplates / Design Tools / Hosting & Deployment / Databases / DevOps Tools / Learning Resources / Developer Tools / APIs & Integration / Productivity & Automation / Security & Authentication -->

**Subcategory (optional):**
<!-- e.g., API Testing, Coding Assistants, etc. -->

---

## Free Tier Details

**Does it have a free tier?**
- [ ] Yes — describe below
- [ ] No — it's paid only (explain why it should still be included)
- [ ] Open Source (self-hostable)

**Free tier details:**
<!-- What's included? Any limits? Credit card required? -->

---

## Why Should It Be Added?

**Best for:**
<!-- Who benefits most from this tool? e.g., "Backend developers testing APIs" -->

**Use cases (list 2-3):**
<!-- e.g., 
- API development and testing
- Collaboration with team on API collections
- Mock server creation -->

**Why it's useful for developers:**
<!-- 1-3 sentences explaining the value -->

---

## Additional Information

**Affiliate Program Available?**
- [ ] Yes (link to affiliate program if known)
- [ ] No
- [ ] Not sure

**Affiliate Program URL (if yes):**

**Your affiliation with this tool:**
- [ ] I'm a user (no affiliation)
- [ ] I work for this company (disclosure)
- [ ] I'm the creator/maintainer (disclosure)

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I've searched and this tool is NOT already in the database
- [ ] The free tier genuinely exists (no credit card required for basic use)
- [ ] This tool is useful globally (not region-locked)
- [ ] I've disclosed any affiliation with this tool

---

*After submission, our bot will auto-validate the URL and generate a description. If approved, a PR will be created automatically!*
